; reTasker: prevent AppLoad's fullscreen chrome trigger from overlapping
; reTasker's own top-right controls.
;
; AppLoad's fullscreen window wrapper ships a high-z Button in the top-right
; corner that reveals the AppLoad X/window bar. That overlaps reTasker's own
; close/settings controls, so disable that trigger and suppress the topbar for
; the reTasker app window. The wrapper title can briefly stay as AppLoad's
; default title, so track the loaded application id instead of matching title.
;
; AppLoad's launcher grid can also call launchWindow(modelData) with incomplete
; model data after a frontend has just unloaded. The stock function creates a
; wrapper before assigning modelData.name, so that error leaves a visible
; orphan "<AppLoad Window>" bar. Guard and sanitize that path too.

AFFECT /appload/qml/appload.qml
    TRAVERSE ?#_appLoadView
        REPLACE launchWindow WITH {
            function launchWindow(modelData, extraArgs, extraEnv) {
                if (!modelData || !modelData.id) {
                    for (let candidate of library.applications) {
                        if (candidate.id === "retasker") {
                            modelData = candidate;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
                if (!modelData || !modelData.id) {
                    console.log("[retasker] ignoring AppLoad launch with incomplete modelData");
                    return { maximize: function () {} };
                }

                let qtfbKey = -1;
                let win;
                const isRetasker = modelData.id === "retasker";
                const externalType = modelData.externalType === undefined ? 0 /* INTERNAL */ : modelData.externalType;
                if(externalType === 2 /* EXTERNAL_QTFB */) {
                    qtfbKey = Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000000);
                }
                if(externalType != 1 /* EXTERNAL_NOGUI */) {
                    /* Create a new window*/
                    if(library.isFrontendRunningFor(modelData.id) && !modelData.canHaveMultipleFrontends) {
                        console.log("Cannot load multiple frontends for app. It doesn't support it.");
                        return { maximize: function () {} };
                    }
                    if(windowArchetype.status !== Component.Ready) {
                        console.log("Window object not ready: " + windowArchetype.status);
                        console.log(windowArchetype.errorString());
                        return { maximize: function () {} };
                    }
                    win = windowArchetype.createObject(absoluteRoot, { x: 100, y: 100 });
                    if(win == null) {
                        console.log("Failed to instantiate a window object!");
                        return { maximize: function () {} };
                    }
                    win.appName = modelData.name ? modelData.name : (isRetasker ? "reTasker" : "<AppLoad Window>");
                    win.supportsScaling = modelData.supportsScaling === true;
                    win.virtualKeyboardLayout = modelData.virtualKeyboardLayout ? modelData.virtualKeyboardLayout : null;
                    win.disablesWindowedMode = isRetasker || modelData.disablesWindowedMode === true;
                    win.virtualKeyboardRef = _appLoadView.virtualKeyboardRef;
                    win.globalWidth = Qt.binding(function() { return _appLoadView.width; })
                    win.globalHeight = Qt.binding(function() { return _appLoadView.height; })
                    let deviceAspectRatio = "original";
                    let applicationAspectRatio = modelData.aspectRatio ? modelData.aspectRatio : "auto";
                    const aspectRatioId = _appLoadView.width < _appLoadView.height ? Math.round(100 * _appLoadView.width / _appLoadView.height) : Math.round(100 * _appLoadView.height / _appLoadView.width);
                    switch(aspectRatioId) {
                        case 75:
                            deviceAspectRatio = "original";
                            break;
                        case 56:
                            deviceAspectRatio = "move";
                            break
                    }
                    const realAspectRatio = applicationAspectRatio == "auto" ? deviceAspectRatio : applicationAspectRatio;
                    console.log("Application starting on device with " + deviceAspectRatio + " aspect ratio (" + aspectRatioId + "). Real aspect ratio of the application is going to be " + realAspectRatio);
                    [win.minWidth, win.minHeight] = [win.implicitWidth, win.implicitHeight] = getMinResolutionFor(realAspectRatio);
                    [win.scaledContentWidth, win.scaledContentHeight] = getResolutionOf(realAspectRatio);
                    win.qtfbKey = qtfbKey;
                    win.closed.connect(() => win.destroy());
                }
                if(externalType == 0 /* INTERNAL */) {
                    win.loadApplication(modelData.id);
                } else if(externalType == 1 /* EXTERNAL_NOGUI */ || externalType == 2 /* EXTERNAL_QTFB */) {
                    win.appPid = library.launchExternal(modelData.id, qtfbKey, extraArgs || [], extraEnv || {});
                }
                return win;
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE

END AFFECT

AFFECT /appload/qml/window.qml
    TRAVERSE ?#root
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property string retaskerLoadedAppId: ""
        }

        REPLACE loadApplication WITH {
            function loadApplication(appId) {
                root.retaskerLoadedAppId = appId;
                coord.loadApplication(appId);
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE ?#topbar
        REPLACE visible WITH {
            visible: root.retaskerLoadedAppId !== "retasker" && (!fullscreen || forceTopBarVisible)
        }
    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE ?#qmldiffReplaceMeButton
        REPLACE visible WITH {
            visible: false
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
